node.description: Setsuo was a former firefighter, who turned into a Flame Human. Through the process of the Human Body Ignition Phenomenon, he was able to keep his consciousness, making him a sentient Flame Human.

Group of identically dressed female fire soldiers of Special Fire Force Company 5. Despite initial appearances and name, there are at least 15 members of this group. At least one of the women possesses an Ignition Ability, making her a Third Generation.
Ogun is a Third Generation and member of Special Fire Force Company 4.

Sumire is a servant of the Evangelist and the Seventh Pillar. She is responsible for creating Pillars for 200 years since the failure of the Great Cataclysm, as well as the burning of St. Raffles Convent and the sisters residing in it.
~!Amaterasu is a survivor of the Great Cataclysm. Possessing an Adolla Burst, she powers Tokyo and is referred to as the First Pillar.!~ She tends to be very manipulative.
